title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 444.660 - Additional time, granted when
text:
444.660.  Additional time, granted when. — The commission may grant such additional time for meeting with the completion dates required by sections 444.500 to 444.755 as are necessary due to an act of God, war, strike, riot or other catastrophe.
(L. 1971 S.B. 1 § 19)
